label: High sugar pattern
reason: Sugary drinks or sweet packaged foods appear repeatedly.
possibleConcern: May increase risk of energy crashes, cravings, and long-term lifestyle concerns.

label: Added sugar watch
reason: Added sugar is present in packaged snacks or breakfast foods.
possibleConcern: Could make daily sugar load higher than expected.

label: High sodium pattern
reason: Instant noodles, chips, or salty packaged foods were found.
possibleConcern: May increase risk of excess sodium intake if frequent.

label: Frequent fried food
reason: Fried snacks appeared in the scan or diary.
possibleConcern: Could increase calorie and oil load when eaten often.

label: Processed food load
reason: Packaged or instant foods are taking space from whole foods.
possibleConcern: May reduce fiber, micronutrient, and protein quality.

label: Low protein signal
reason: The pattern has quick carbs or snacks without enough protein.
possibleConcern: May affect fullness and balanced daily energy.

label: Refined flour signal
reason: Maida/refined flour appears in the item pattern.
possibleConcern: May crowd out whole grains if used frequently.

label: Palm/refined oil signal
reason: Packaged food may include palm oil or refined oils.
possibleConcern: Could add hidden fat load when eaten often.

label: Trans fat warning
reason: The label mentions trans fat or hydrogenated fat.
possibleConcern: Avoid frequent use; consider safer alternatives.

label: Artificial color watch
reason: The label mentions artificial colors or synthetic additives.
possibleConcern: May be better kept occasional, especially for children.

label: High spice watch
reason: The meal was marked high in spice.
possibleConcern: May cause discomfort for some people if frequent, especially with fried or outside food.
